pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to provide OpenAPI/Swagger documentation support compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing and mocking HTTP services in tests.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues or provide specific validation API version.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin with specific fork node implementation to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Restructure pom.xml with numbered comments and explicit sections for better readability and maintenance.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since the new base image does not include it.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script, ensuring compatibility with the new environment.
Add Maven build step to compile the application within the Docker image.
Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the specific Java application jar.
Copy application source and configuration files into the image to support the new build and run steps.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# demo-spring-react-kitchensink' header and old content with '# STARTER-team03' and new instructions.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project identity.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with TypeScript type annotation.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework to use react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to deprecation or change in build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL logic for localhost vs GitHub Pages.
Wrap Storybook stories with ToastContainer to display toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const preview = { parameters: { ... }, loaders: [mswLoader] }; export default preview;

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add mswLoader to the preview loaders array to integrate MSW with Storybook.
Update Storybook parameters to include controls matchers for color and date types.
Remove unused import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Update development mode instructions to use more natural phrasing.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Changed 'view it in the browser' to 'view it in your browser' and 'if you make edits' to 'when you make changes'.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Fix smart quotes and apostrophes in the eject section for consistency.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced curly quotes (’ and “) with straight quotes (') in the 'npm run eject' description.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Adjust the baseUrl in jsconfig.json to use a relative path without the leading dot for cleaner configuration.
Explicitly define the include array in jsconfig.json to specify which directories should be included in the project scope.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrate package-lock.json from lockfileVersion 1 to 3 to align with modern npm versions and Node.js 20 environment.
